arts.ttl: Ferencvaros vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Hungary for their Europa League exploits this week to face Ferencvaros in the capital. After a shaky start to the season, Spurs sealed their fourth consecutive win in all competitions on Sunday, with a resounding 3-0 triumph over a dejected Manchester United. However, Ferencvaros will provide a different sort of challenge for […] The post Ferencvaros vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Johan Lange exclusive: Tottenham chief on transfer strategy, data, Levy's role and beating Barca to Bergvall
arts.sum: In his first major interview since joining Spurs, Lange insists the club are being deliberately ruthless in a bid to win now

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid are eyeing £39m Tottenham Hotspur player
BREAKING: Dominic Solanke handed England recall as long-time star sweats on return to squad
arts.sum: The Tottenham Hotspur striker has scored in each of his last three matches as he settles into life in North London and has earned himself a Three Lions recall under interim boss Lee Carsley

arts.ttl: I wanted to sign for Tottenham but Arsenal director stopped me
arts.sum: Whether that was to do with his Arsenal connections, or just because he wanted to keep Guerrero in Brazil, only he will know. As reported by Sport Witness, Guerrero said: "When I arrived at Corinthians, I said to myself: ‘I win the Club World Cup and I’ll go back’ [to Europe].

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's unusual training decision and the youngster making a first Tottenham appearance
arts.sum: There were a number of Tottenham youngsters involved in the session, including Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear, who both train regularly with the first team, but also academy defenders Alfie Dorrington and Dante Cassanova as well as 18-year-old winger Damola Ajayi, getting a first real chance to impress Postecoglou. Tottenham Hotspur took to the pitch inside the Groupama Stadium in Budapest for their final training session ahead of the Europa League game at Ferencvaros.

arts.ttl: Ferencvaros vs Tottenham predicted - Brennan Johnson stars again but big opportunity missed - football.london
arts.sum: We predict that Spurs could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Gray, Davies; Sarr, Bissouma, Bergvall; Johnson, Solanke, Werner. After winning possession deep Spurs' half, a one-two between Kristoffer Zachariassen and Barnabas Varga saw the latter break through on goal before slotting under Guglielmo Vicario.

arts.ttl: How to watch Ferencvaros vs Spurs - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: football.london takes a look at the important TV info and how to watch Ferencvaros vs Tottenham in the Europa League. Tottenham Hotspur return to Europa League action this evening as they travel to face Ferencvaros.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ready to compete against Arsenal and Liverpool to sign English midfielder
arts.sum: According to Fichajes, Tottenham have joined the race to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. The England international has impressed some of the biggest clubs in the league with his fine form for the South London club. As per the report, Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are monitoring the progress of the young midfielder and […] The post Tottenham ready to compete against Arsenal and Liverpool to sign English midfielder appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: James Maddison: "I feel alive on the pitch at the minute"
arts.sum: It’s if I just take care of my performances for Spurs, which I feel like I’m doing at the minute to a high level, then the other stuff will take care of itself, hopefully. First up, and straight in, James was asked if he helt he'd done enough to get back into the England squad...
